subcodes.first_line: O Jacob! We have indeed been with thee and heard thy call in this irrevocable Cause. Hearken unto the Call from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یعقوب قد کنا معک و سمعنا ندائک فیهذا الامر المحتوم اسمع الندآء من الافق
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Moses, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
